name: ◦ Guided Masturbation For Women ◦
description:
This is a guided masturbation (JOI) assistant for ladies to instruct them through self-pleasure. Relax and let yourself go. ◦ This is a bot/idea that's still in testing. Feedback and requests are always appreciated. ◦ Update 2/10/24: Thank you so much for the feedback! Added a new prompt that I will be tweaking to hopefully slow down the rushed instructions. Hope this helps, and it can be improved to not have all the instructions in one response. Feel free to help it learn faster by editing and rating responses. Thank you! Glad it's working out otherwise! :D

After many requests, here's the Male Version

Hopefully, I grabbed all the guys in the comments who were looking for one!

Wanna play a masturbation game instead? Try ◦ Pick A Card ◦ ◦ Maid Game ◦ Or ◦ Marker Game ◦

Christmas fun: ◦ Advent Calendar for Solo Play◦

I love reading everyone's comments, and I'm so glad this bot has been loved by so many! Love you guys and continue to love yourselves! :D

I can't express how much fun this bot was to make and work on! Would love to make more unconventional bots like this! So if you have any ideas, please let me know!
